title: Keweenaw Bay Indian Community Land Claim Settlement Act of 2025
short_title: Keweenaw Bay Indian Community Land Claim Settlement Act of 2025
stage_label: Referred to the Subcommittee on Indian and Insular Affairs.
crs_summary: Keweenaw Bay Indian Community Land Claim Settlement Act of 2025 This bill directs the Department of the Interior to transfer funds to the Keweenaw Bay Indian Community (KBIC) in Baraga County, Michigan, in order to settle the KBIC's land claims and clear title to those lands. The KBIC may use these funds for any lawful purpose except to acquire land for gaming.
